content: Form fillers can fill out forms and view only their completed/started forms within the Complete and In Process folders.

comment.text: This is a tooltip description for the "Form Filler" role in a Form Room. It explains the permissions of a form filler, specifically that they can fill out forms and view only their own forms in the "Complete" and "In Process" folders.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The possessive pronoun 'their' is missing. The English clearly states 'view only their completed/started forms' but the Arabic omits the equivalent possessive marker, saying only 'view the completed/started forms'. In permission descriptions, this distinction is critical to clarify that form fillers can only see their own forms, not all forms in the system.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: يمكن لمعبئي النماذج تعبئة النماذج وعرض نماذجهم المكتملة/التي بدأت فقط داخل مجلدات الاكتمال والمراحل الجارية.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The possessive pronoun 'their' is explicitly stated in English ('their completed/started forms') but is missing in the Italian translation ('i moduli' should be 'i loro moduli'). This omits important information about ownership/scope.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Chi compila i moduli può compilare i moduli e visualizzare solo i loro moduli completati/iniziati nelle cartelle Completato e In corso.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Japanese translation omits the possessive qualifier 'their' from 'their completed/started forms'. The English explicitly states form fillers can view only 'their' forms, but the Japanese 'フォームのみを表示することができます' (can view only forms) lacks the possessive 'their own' (自分の). In a permissions context, this distinction is critical—form fillers should only access their own forms, not all completed forms.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: フォーム記入者は、フォームに記入し、「完成」および「処理中」フォルダ内の自分の入力済み/開始済みフォームのみを表示することができます。

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'their' in 'their completed/started forms' is missing from the Latvian translation. The translation says 'aizpildītās/sāktās veidlapas' (completed/started forms) without the possessive marker 'savas' (one's own). This is critical because form fillers should only see THEIR OWN forms, not any completed/started forms.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Veidlapu aizpildītāji var aizpildīt veidlapas un skatīt tikai savas aizpildītās/sāktās veidlapas mapēs Complete (Pabeigts) un In Process (Notiekošs).

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Polish translation is missing the possessive 'their' (Polish: 'swoje'). The English explicitly states form fillers can view 'their completed/started forms', emphasizing they can only see their own forms. The Polish version 'wypełnione/rozpoczęte formularze' (completed/started forms) loses this ownership qualifier, making it ambiguous whether form fillers can see all completed forms or only their own.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Osoby wypełniające formularze mogą wypełniać formularze i wyświetlać tylko swoje wypełnione/rozpoczęte formularze w katalogach Gotowe oraz W toku.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The possessive 'their' is missing from the Portuguese translation. English says 'their completed/started forms' but Portuguese says 'os formulários concluídos/iniciados' (the completed/started forms). This loses the critical meaning that form fillers can ONLY see forms THEY THEMSELVES filled out, not all completed/started forms in the system.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Os preenchedores de formulários podem preencher formulários e visualizar apenas seus formulários concluídos/iniciados nas pastas Concluído e Em processamento.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The possessive 'their' is missing from the Romanian translation. The English explicitly specifies 'their completed/started forms' to clarify that form fillers can only view their own forms. The Romanian 'formularele completate/începute' omits this critical possessive specification, which could cause ambiguity about the permission boundary—it could be misread as form fillers can view any completed/started forms rather than only their own.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Persoanele care completează formularele pot completa formulare și pot vizualiza numai formularele lor completate/începute în folderele Complete și In Process.
